query:
SELECT 
  pe.id,
  pe.participantId,
  p.displayName,
  pe.amountPence,
  pe.reason,
  pe.status,
  pe.createdAt
FROM payment_events pe
JOIN participants p ON pe.participantId = p.id
WHERE p.displayName IN ('Chess', 'Nat', 'CTM')
ORDER BY p.displayName, pe.createdAt DESC;
